overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic neon-lit city at night during heavy rain. The vehicle follows a red vintage car through wet streets, enters a concrete tunnel with red emergency lighting, and continues through dense urban areas with holographic billboards and towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy neon-lit urban street with cyberpunk storefronts

events.description: accelerates rapidly from low speed to high speed while following the red car
turns right at intersection, leaving the red vintage car behind

agents.ego_description: driving through rainy city streets at night, following a red vintage car before accelerating through an intersection

notable_agents.action: red vintage car driving ahead with illuminated tail lights, later turning left at the intersection

tall buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows lining the street
large illuminated sign with red Asian characters on a building facade
tall street lamps with blue-white lighting illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle following a red vintage car through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. Neon signs in Asian characters glow on building facades while street lamps reflect off the wet asphalt. The driver accelerates and turns right at an intersection, leaving the red car behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching concrete tunnel entrance with visible red lighting inside

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets, making turns as the tunnel entrance approaches ahead

entered.detail: concrete tunnel entrance with red emergency lighting visible inside the archway
ground-level shops with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through urban commercial streets lined with neon-lit storefronts, the vehicle approaches a concrete tunnel entrance. The red car and large signage from the previous section fall behind as the tunnel archway with its distinctive red interior lighting becomes the focal point ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with red emergency lighting

events.description: enters tunnel, ambient lighting shifts from neon to dark red emergency lights
approaching tunnel exit, bright neon lights and city glow visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel with red ambient lighting, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: rough concrete walls with red emergency lighting fixtures and graffiti markings
exposed ventilation ducts and industrial pipes running along the tunnel ceiling
red glowing light fixtures mounted on the tunnel walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights. The rough concrete walls and exposed ceiling pipes create an industrial atmosphere, contrasting sharply with the neon-lit streets outside. The lighting gradually brightens as the tunnel exit approaches, revealing the city glow ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with massive digital billboards

events.description: exits tunnel into open city area with large holographic advertisements and digital screens

agents.ego_description: driving through open city streets with large digital billboards and holographic displays visible on all sides

notable_agents.action: blue vehicle with headlights on passing on the left side of the road

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on building facade
floating holographic display with bright product imagery suspended in the air
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising above the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and floating holographic advertisements. A blue vehicle passes on the left as the car navigates through the open area, with a tall glass office tower visible on the left and bright commercial signage on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban commercial street with ground-level storefronts

events.description: makes sharp turn at intersection, navigating around corner building

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrower city streets, making turns at intersections while passing storefronts

entered.detail: ground floor retail spaces with bright neon signage and illuminated window displays
angular building facade at street intersection with multiple stories

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving through dense urban streets lined with ground-level shops and corner buildings. The vehicle makes a sharp turn at an intersection, navigating around a prominent corner building while passing parked vehicles and brightly lit storefronts with neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city that transitions from neon-lit streets into a stark industrial tunnel before opening into a sprawling commercial plaza. It begins by trailing a red vintage car through wet asphalt and glowing Asian signage, eventually accelerating away at an intersection to leave the vehicle behind. As the car navigates past neon storefronts, the environment shifts abruptly as it enters a narrow concrete tunnel defined by rough walls and oppressive red emergency lighting. The scene then expands as the vehicle exits the tunnel, emerging into a wide urban plaza dominated by massive floating holograms, digital billboards, and towering glass office buildings. Finally, the camera weaves through dense city streets and parked cars, making a sharp turn around a prominent corner building amidst a blur of brightly lit storefronts.
